provenance.note: All scientific values in the portfolio frontend are derived from this findings export. No values are manually hardcoded.

calima.over_read_definition: Cases where public PM10-only index score exceeded the CMPI score for the same station-hour during a confirmed calima event (dual-criterion: PM10 > 72h rolling mean + 1.5σ AND PM10/PM2.5 ratio > 3.0)
